---
layout: page
title: Why R?
output:
  md_document:
    variant: gfm
    preserve_yaml: true
---

```{r echo=FALSE}
source("../R/functions.R")
```
  
The only thing you need for this course is a laptop that can connect to wifi. 
Everything on the day is run via the cloud, so no additional software is needed.


`r jr_footer("advanced")`
